title: MONTHLY DROP IN CENTER - 211info
text: THE GLORIA CENTER MONTHLY DROP IN CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides access to showers and laundry facilities, hygiene items, a hot meal, warming and cooling supplies (blankets, tarps, hats, gloves, socks, hand and toe warmers, hydration packets, cooling towels, sunscreen, and lip balm), and connections to community resources. 2505 W 7th Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: January-October Last Friday of the month 9am-3pm, hot meal noon-3pm November-December 3rd Friday of the month 9am-3pm, hot meal noon-3pm Email (541) 298-5131 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 298-5131 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Visit website to verify dates. Laundry must be dropped off before 10am Call or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Hood River, Sherman, and Wasco Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Services: Camping Gear Community Meals Drop In Centers Laundry Facilities Personal/Grooming Supplies Public Showers/Baths Specialized Information and Referral * Homelessness Issues Winter Clothing Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY HOUSING/SHELTER - EVICTION PREVENTION HOUSING/SHELTER - RAPID REHOUSING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES UTILITIES - UTILITY ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. THE GLORIA CENTER
